vimcheck 0.0.3
  • Get started

    • Using plotting and preparation functions
  • Changelog

Package index

Package-level documentation

vimcheck vimcheck-package
vimcheck: Diagnostics for Vaccine Impact Modelling Consortium Burden and Impact Estimates

Diagnostic functions

Package diagnostic functions.

basic_burden_sanity()
Sanity checks on burden estimates
check_demography_alignment()
Check incoming burden cohort size against interpolated population
validate_complete_incoming_files()
Validate files in a burden estimate
validate_file_dict_template()
Validate file dictionary template
validate_template_alignment()
Check incoming burden set against template

Plotting prepartion

Prepare validated data for plotting.

prep_plot_demography() prep_plot_age() prep_plot_burden_decades() prep_plot_global_burden() prep_plot_coverage_set() prep_plot_fvp()
Prepare data for plotting

Plotting functions

Package plotting functions.

plot_compare_demography() plot_age_patterns() plot_global_burden_decades() plot_global_burden() plot_coverage_set() plot_fvp()
Plot burden and impact diagnostics
theme_vimc() theme_vimc_noxaxis()
Plotting theme for vimcheck

Internal functions

Internal helper functions.

make_novax_scenario()
Make data for a no-vaccination scenario

Data

Package data.

eg_burden_template
Example of VIMC burden template provided to modellers
eg_coverage
Example of scenario coverage data
eg_fvps
Example of FVP estimate data
eg_wpp
Example of UN-WPP time-series data

Constants

Package constants.

file_dict_colnames scenario_data_colnames burden_outcome_names colnames_plot_demog_compare
Package constants
